name: VTIL_BlockRxMessage
title: VTIL_BlockRxMessage
syntax: long VTIL_BlockRxMessage(dword pgn, dword sourceAddress, qword filterMask, qword filterValue); // form 1
description: Prevents processing of a received message by the interaction layer.
The message to block is specified by PGN, destination source address and a part of the first eight data bytes.
To revert this command you can use VTIL_ResetBlockedRxMessage or VTIL_ResetAllBlockedRxMessages.

parameters.name: pgn
parameters.description: The message with this PGN shall be blocked.
